app.name: iamspeaker
app.tagline: Open-source presentation practice — upload slides, get an AI demo talk, then record and get feedback.

home.headline: Upload your slides — AI gives the demo talk first
home.subhead: Don't start from a blank page. Get an AI demo talk in minutes, then improve through measured feedback on pace, pronunciation, and fillers — for native and non-native speakers alike.
home.ctaSub: No API key · 100% local · open source
home.step1Desc: Drop in a PPTX or PDF and we analyze the slides.
home.step2Desc: A polished demo script, shown right next to your slide.
home.step3Desc: We measure pace, pronunciation, and fillers, then give prescriptive feedback.
home.why1: Privacy — uploads, recordings, and analysis stay on your device.
home.why2: Free & open source — clone it and self-host instantly.
home.why3: Local-first models — the whole loop runs without an API key.
home.why4: Native-language coaching — non-native pronunciation and phrasing, fixed with L1 rules.

engines.title: Active AI engines
engines.unreachable: Can't reach the AI engine. Make sure Ollama is running (ollama serve), or set a cloud key in .env.
engines.qualityHint: Using a small local model — demo length and translation quality may be limited. For better results, set a larger model (e.g. qwen2.5:14b) or a cloud key in .env.

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again shortly

upload.title: Upload slides
upload.desc: Upload PPTX/PDF + presentation settings (target time, tone, language, native language).

critique.title: Slide review
critique.empty: No analysis yet. Click 'Analyze slides' to start.

demo.title: AI demo talk
demo.noSession: No session. Please upload slides first.
demo.empty: No script yet. Click 'Generate AI demo' to start.
demo.audioUnavailable: Audio unavailable (TTS may not be set up)
demo.slidePreviewHint: No slide previews? PPTX→image conversion needs LibreOffice (PDF doesn't). Without it, slides show as text.

progress.title: Progress history
progress.noData: No recordings yet. Try a practice recording.

compare.title: Compare takes
compare.noSelection: Two takes are needed. Pick them on the progress page.
compare.scoreHint: Scores are 0–100, higher is better (▲ = B improved)

record.title: Practice recording
record.noMic: This browser/environment doesn't support microphone recording

report.title: Feedback report
report.noRecording: No recording. Please record a practice run first.
report.deliveryScoreHint: Average of the measured metric scores
report.pronPhonemeLegend: Phonemes: green = correct, red = needs work
report.cueNone: No pacing issues to flag this take 👍
report.cue_pace_fast: Slide {slide}: too fast ({value} WPM) — take a beat
report.cue_pace_slow: Slide {slide}: slow ({value} WPM) — speak with more energy
report.cue_time_long: Slide {slide}: ran long ({value}s) — keep only the essentials
report.cue_filler: Slide {slide}: {value} fillers clustered — you hesitated here
report.cue_monotone: Your pace barely changes (range {value} WPM) — vary it to emphasize
report.cueTip_pace_fast: Plant deliberate pauses around key lines — emphasis over speed
report.cueTip_time_long: Keep the essentials, cut the tangents
report.cueTip_time_short: Add a clearer transition or a key takeaway line
report.cueTip_filler: Simplify the phrasing so it flows in one breath
report.cueTip_monotone: Slow down and pause at key points — variation creates emphasis
report.cue_risk: {value} credibility-weakening expressions ({text}) — be confident, specific, evidence-backed
report.cueTip_risk: Swap hedges, vague words, and apologies for confident, evidence-backed claims — it builds trust
report.cue_intonation: Your intonation was monotone ({value}-semitone pitch range) — vary your tone at key moments
report.cueTip_intonation: Lift your pitch on key words and vary your sentence endings — monotony loses attention

qa.title: Q&A preparation
qa.empty: Click 'Generate questions' to get likely investor questions.
qa.noMic: This browser/environment doesn't support microphone recording

improve.title: Improvement suggestions
improve.noRecording: No recording. Please record a practice run first.
improve.empty: Click 'Generate suggestions' to get AI improvements.

editor.vocabHint: Advanced (C1/C2) words may lose your audience — plainer options:
